title: hosts(5) Alias Support Design
summary: Technical design adding hostname alias support to router-hosts import/export, including protobuf update-wrapper API changes and data model changes.
notes: Design doc (Status: Approved) with API contracts, data models, and breaking-change semantics -> SPEC. Competes with DOC (prose design rationale) but implementation contracts dominate. Not an ADR: multi-decision design plan, not a single locked decision record.
